content.full_text:
Patty A. Goodwin
Councilwoman

City Hall
P.O. Box 1440
23119 Cottonwood
Building B
Moreno Valley, CA
92388-9664

People
Pride
Progress

(714) 243-3008
Fax: (714) 243-3009

August 22, 1990

John Wallace
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, Ca. 95814

Dear Mr. Wallace,

I am currently a member of the City Council in the City of Moreno Valley. In March of
1990, I established a campaign committee and collected campaign contributions with the
intention of running for re-election. I have, however, decided against running for City
Council and would like advise on how to return the money collected to those that
contributed to me.

Thank you for your help.

Sincerely,

Patty A. Goodwin
Councilwoman, City of Moreno Valley

PAG:rh
